poi.camp.open: Camp chest creaks; ration cache intact.
You pry open the camp coffer and find preserved rations.
A weathered lock yields; supplies are still usable.
archive.accept: Archivist marks your ledger with a delivery seal.
The archive clerk records your task in careful script.
A wax-stamped order sends you to recover field goods.
archive.submit: Delivered crates are logged and shelved by lot number.
Quartermaster signs receipt; reward coffer is released.
Archive runners verify tags, then unlock your reward.
